revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:瓢塚古墳]]
'''Hisagozuka Kofun''' (瓢塚古墳, also spelled ひさごづかこふん・ひさご塚古墳) is a common name for various [[Kofun|ancient Kofuns]] ({{ill|Kofun|en|Kofun|qid=Q1141225|lt=Kofun|1=Kofun}}) across {{ill|Japan|en|Japan|qid=Q17|lt=Japan|1=Japan}}. The name originates from the resemblance of {{ill|Zenpokoenfun|en|Zenpokoenfun|qid=Q11268718|lt=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpōkōenfun}} to a {{ill|gourd|ja|瓢箪|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/gourd|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヒョウタン|1=Calabash|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1277255}} (hisago/hyōtan).
* {{ill|Hisagozuka Kofun (Kakegawa)|ja|瓢塚古墳 (掛川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hisagozuka Kofun (Kakegawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579006|1=Hisagozuka Kofun (Kakegawa)}} - A kofun in [[Kakegawa City]], {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|en|Shizuoka Prefecture|qid=Q131320|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}} (keyhole-shaped Kofun). * {{ill|Shiramizu Hisagozuka Kofun|ja|白水瓢塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiramizu Hisagozuka Kofun|qq=}} - A kofun in [[:en:Kobe City|Kobe City]], {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|en|Hyōgo Prefecture|qid=Q130290|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|1=Hyōgo Prefecture}} (keyhole-shaped Kofun). Designated as a Hyōgo Prefectural Historic Site. * {{ill|Hisagozuka Kofun (Himeji)|en|Hisagozuka Kofun (Himeji)|qid=Q48764117|lt=Hisagozuka Kofun (Himeji)|1=Hisagozuka Kofun (Himeji)}} - A kofun in [[Himeji City]], {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|en|Hyōgo Prefecture|qid=Q130290|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|1=Hyōgo Prefecture}} (keyhole-shaped Kofun). Also known as "Yoro Hisagozuka Kofun" (丁瓢塚古墳). Designated as a National Historic Site. * {{ill|Hisagozuka Kofun (Kan'onji)|ja|ひさご塚古墳 (観音寺市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hisagozuka Kofun (Kan'onji)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579010|1=Hisagozuka Kofun (Kan'onji)}} - A kofun in [[Kan'onji City]], {{ill|Kagawa Prefecture|en|Kagawa Prefecture|qid=Q161454|lt=Kagawa Prefecture|1=Kagawa Prefecture}} (keyhole-shaped Kofun). * {{ill|Hisagozuka Kofun (Karatsu)|ja|瓢塚古墳 (唐津市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hisagozuka Kofun (Karatsu)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579014|1=Hisagozuka Kofun (Karatsu)}} - A kofun in [[:en:Karatsu City|Karatsu City]], {{ill|Saga Prefecture|en|Saga Prefecture|qid=Q160420|lt=Saga Prefecture|1=Saga Prefecture}} (keyhole-shaped Kofun). Designated as a Saga Prefectural Historic Site. * {{ill|Hisagozuka Kofun (Higashisonogi)|ja|ひさご塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hisagozuka Kofun (Higashisonogi)|qq=}} - A kofun in [[Higashisonogi Town]], {{ill|Nagasaki Prefecture|en|Nagasaki Prefecture|qid=Q169376|lt=Nagasaki Prefecture|1=Nagasaki Prefecture}} (keyhole-shaped Kofun). Designated as a Nagasaki Prefectural Historic Site.
== Related Articles == * {{ill|Hyōtan-yama Kofun|ja|瓢箪山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-yama Kofun|qq=}} * {{ill|Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|ja|瓢箪塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|qq=}}
